title: WorldDragger
description: Select and drag your builds visually through the world by looking in the direction!
body:
![A tree gets selected, outlines appear, by looking in a different direction it moves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27da7e6a2a51547807444bd8ad34173c770f39a7.gif)

**Move mountains, duplicate villages, fill your friend's server with silly builds because he gave you OP (use with caution) or mass duplicate redstone calc units in your redstone computer, and more with just a swing of your head. It could not be easier.**


WorldDrag lets you select and move builds, redstone machines and any other block constellations and entities.
1. Select
2. Cut-/Copy Drag (& rotate)
3. Paste

Move those blocks by changing the looking direction.

![A redstone build gets selected, duplicated and rotated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2be264e78dad0d211a8f10053a4c32fc73295fdc.gif)

Rotate it!

### How to use:
- Hold stick
- _Left-click_ = **select** new
- _Right-click_ = **include** more
- _Look on selection_ + _Left-click drag_ = **cut** & **move**
- _Look on selection_ + _Right-click drag_ = **copy** & **move**
- _Drag_ + _Mouse wheel_ = **rotate**
- _Stop drag_ = **paste**!

### Config screen (since v5.2)
- Change the controlling item (default: stick)
- Default key: 'N' (Bad choice? Make a better suggestion!)

### Doesn't work? Make sure:
- Cheats On & be OP
- Hold the controlling item (default: stick)

### Commands:
/worlddrag ... gets used by the mod to send the instructions, but can be used by the player too.

### Client-Side?
The mod isn't absolutely required on the server and works on client-side only too, but:...

### When mod isn't on server:
- ... it will use the /clone command instead
- /clone limitations:
  - doesn't have the rotation feature.
  - can't include mobs
  - because of no clipboard behavior with /clone, it cuts the blocks when pasting instead of when starting the drag

### Found sth annoying or a flaw?
Tell me!
### Have suggestions?
Tell me!

### Recent changes:
- 5.2: adds a config screen. Default key 'N'. Control item specifiable. For <=1.21.5 discontinued because 5.1 has everything essential.
- 5.1: selection-hit cross. Crash fixes. For <=1.21.3 discontinued because no.
- 5.0: all entities get copied now.
- 4.1: removes crashes.
- 4.0: block entities get copied too.
- 3.0: tickable blocks like button or pressure plate won't stay stuck after being moved in the activated state.
- 2.2: increased range while holding the stick.
- 2.1: fixed selection hit.
- 2.0: added rotation.
- 1.0: first version.


edit, 1.21.x, 1.21.7, 1.21, Fabric, mark blocks
